violations.text: Raw animal foods (shelled eggs) were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods (beets) in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

(Glass cleaner) was stored on prep table. Chemicals must be stored to prevent the contamination of clean equipment, utensils linens, and/or single service by spacing or partitioning and locating them in an area that is not above food, equipment utensils, linens, and single service articles. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025

The non-food contact surfaces of the following have an accumulation of: 1. Can opener (black/brown residue) 2. Walk-in cooler shelving (food residue, other debris) 3. Ice machine fan (dust, dirt) 4. Walk-in Freezer (frost buildup) 5. Refrigeration units throughout (food residue and other debris) 6. Hoods (grease, dirt and soil residue) PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/14/2025
The wall in the utensil storage area is in poor repair, observed peeling/chipping paint. The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 01/28/2025
